class.name: SimulationManager
class.brief_description: Manages the 16-byte bitwise grid simulation, including scent waves, branchless evolution, and AVX2-accelerated biological CA.
class.description: The SimulationManager is the primary GDExtension bridge between Godot and the C++ simulation engine. It handles the lifetime of the grid memory, the execution of the "8-Step Symphony" execution pipeline, and a Pooled Structure of Arrays (SoA) for unit management and deterministic combat. It features AVX2 SIMD biological scent propagation and branchless bitwise evolution.

method.name: add_annihilation
method.description: Registers a mutual annihilation rule between two effect bits. If both bits are present on a tile during a simulation step, they will both be destroyed.

method.name: add_biome_transition
method.description: Defines how a specific biome reacts to a surviving effect bit. For example, Fire (effect) on Grass (biome) could result in Ash (new biome).

method.name: add_chemistry
method.description: Registers a chemical combination rule. If Bit A and Bit B are present, they are consumed to create the resulting effect stack.

method.name: add_evolution_path
method.description: Registers an evolution transition. If a unit of current_species eats a specific mana bit, it will evolve into the result_species.

method.name: auto_update_scent
method.description: Automatically calculates the legacy smellnet BFS propagation using all active Player units (Team 0) as scent sources.

method.name: clear_interaction_tables
method.description: Wipes all interaction and evolution LUTs. Useful for re-loading definitions from JSON.

method.name: despawn_unit
method.description: Removes a unit from the simulation and returns its ID to the pool's free-list.

method.name: generate_new_world
method.description: Clears the grid and generates a new world state based on the provided seed.

method.name: get_all_units
method.description: Returns a dictionary of all active entity IDs and their current Vector2i grid positions.

method.name: get_grid_data
method.description: Returns the raw 1D array of 16-byte tiles as a PackedByteArray, suitable for high-speed shader processing.

method.name: get_scent
method.description: Returns the legacy 4-bit scent value for the specified coordinate.

method.name: get_scent_map_string
method.description: Returns an ASCII representation of the legacy scent grid for debugging.

method.name: get_tile_composition
method.description: Returns the 8-bit composition (biome ID) of the specified tile.

method.name: get_tile_effects
method.description: Returns the current 64-bit effect stack for the specified tile.

method.name: get_tile_mana
method.description: Returns the 8-bit ambient mana bitmask for the specified tile.

method.name: get_unit_at
method.description: Returns the entity ID located at the specified grid coordinate, or -1 if empty.

method.name: get_unit_diet
method.description: Returns the 8-bit mana bitmask representing the unit's required diet.

method.name: get_unit_flags
method.description: Returns the bitmask of EntityFlags (e.g., PUSH, HERBIVORE) for the specified unit.

method.name: get_unit_intent_pos
method.description: Returns the intended movement destination for the specified unit.

method.name: get_unit_pos
method.description: Returns the current grid position of the specified unit.

method.name: get_unit_sated_timer
method.description: Returns the remaining steps for which the unit will remain sated (not eating).

method.name: get_unit_team
method.description: Returns the team ID for the specified unit.

method.name: get_unit_velocity
method.description: Returns the current movement speed for the specified unit.

method.name: get_unit_weight
method.description: Returns the base mass for the specified unit.

method.name: is_impassable
method.description: Returns true if the tile is flagged as impassable for movement.

method.name: load_state_snapshot
method.description: Restores the simulation state from the last saved snapshot.

method.name: move_unit_intent
method.description: Sets a unit's movement plan for the next sub-step execution.

method.name: process_ai_intents
method.description: Commands all active AI units to calculate plans based on scent waves and hunting logic.

method.name: run_step
method.description: Executes one discrete simulation step of the 8-Step Symphony pipeline.

method.name: save_state_snapshot
method.description: Captures a raw binary snapshot of the world state.

method.name: set_biome_weight
method.description: Sets the impact resistance weight for a specific biome.

method.name: set_effect_weight
method.description: Sets the mass modifier for a specific effect bit.

method.name: set_flammable
method.description: Configures flammability for a specific biome.

method.name: set_impassable
method.description: Sets or clears the impassable flag.

method.name: set_propagation_interval
method.description: Sets the spread speed for an effect bit.

method.name: set_propagation_rule
method.description: Configures spread constraints for an effect bit.

method.name: set_species_stats
method.description: Sets the base physics stats for a specific species ID.

method.name: set_tile_composition
method.description: Sets the biome ID for a tile.

method.name: set_tile_effect
method.description: Injects an effect bit into a tile.

method.name: set_tile_mana
method.description: Sets the transient ambient mana bitmask for a tile.

method.name: set_unit_diet
method.description: Sets the mana diet requirements for a unit.

method.name: set_unit_flags
method.description: Sets special ability flags for a unit.

method.name: spawn_unit
method.description: Spawns a unit with default stats.

method.name: spawn_unit_full
method.description: Spawns a unit with specific physics stats and ability flags.

members.member: The vertical height of the grid in tiles.
The horizontal width of the grid in tiles.

constants.constant: Unit returns to origin after a failed clash.
Unit pushes defenders on a failed weight check.
Unit uses biological scent waves for navigation.
